idea-plugin.name: SpoonOpenMocker
idea-plugin.description: Desktop control panel for the OpenMocker library — edit REST mocks and fire WebSocket events on a connected Android device.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0-beta2
  • REST tab: add Delay (ms) field to mock responses.
  • UX: non-blocking actions (no IDE freeze), confirm dialog for Clear all, inline save feedback, empty-state hints, Enter to save, selection kept after save.
  • Fix: polling lifecycle on tool window re-show; control server socket read timeout to avoid hangs.
0.1.0-beta1 — first internal beta.
  • Tool window control panel for a connected Android device (REST + WebSocket).
  • Device dropdown with automatic adb forward.
  • REST tab: poll recorded requests, edit/save mocks, un-mock or clear all.
  • WebSocket tab: pick a sink, fire preset or custom payloads, list received frames.
